data.title: Tevogen Bio Announces 1-for-50 Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tevogen Bio Holdings ( (TVGN) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 3, 2026, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. filed a Certificate of Amendment in Delaware to implement a 1-for-50 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective March 6, 2026, following shareholder approval on February 19, 2026. The move will reduce the roughly 202.4 million outstanding shares proportionally without changing authorized share count or relative ownership stakes, aside from minor adjustments due to cash in lieu of fractional shares.

Tevogen’s board approved the split to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq’s $1.00 minimum bid price requirement, with trading to begin on a split-adjusted basis under the unchanged TVGN ticker and a new CUSIP. All equity awards, warrants, and convertible preferred stock will be adjusted to reflect the new share ratio, leaving the company’s underlying operations and total stockholders’ equity unchanged but potentially stabilizing its listing status and market perception.

The most recent analyst rating on (TVGN) stock is a Sell with a $0.26 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tevogen Bio Holdings stock, see the TVGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TVGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TVGN is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity), which outweighs the benefit of lower debt. Technicals add further pressure with a strong downtrend and negative MACD, while valuation metrics offer limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TVGN stock, click here.

More about Tevogen Bio Holdings

Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. is a socially integrated healthcare enterprise focused on affordability, efficiency, and scientific rigor in advanced therapeutics. The company leverages artificial intelligence and precision T cell therapy platforms through its Tevogen Bio and Tevogen.AI initiatives to develop treatments in virology, oncology, neurology, and scalable solutions for the broader healthcare system.

Tevogen Bio has completed a proof-of-concept clinical trial for its single-HLA-restricted, genetically unmodified allogeneic T cells, built on its proprietary ExacTcell platform. Tevogen.AI aims to accelerate drug development and target detection using predictive technologies and cloud-based data services, while the company also explores future strategic moves in generics, biosimilars, medical devices, and innovative insurance solutions to expand patient access.

Average Trading Volume: 946,067

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $49.92M

See more data about TVGN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Carnival Updates Share Capital and Voting Rights Totals
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Carnival ( (GB:CCL) ) just unveiled an update.

Carnival plc has confirmed that, as of 28 February 2026, it had 217,413,915 issued ordinary shares, of which 28,398,278 are held in treasury and 42,876,272 held by Carnival Corporation do not carry voting rights. This results in 146,139,365 voting rights attached to 189,015,637 issued and outstanding ordinary shares, a figure shareholders must now use as the denominator when assessing disclosure obligations under FCA transparency rules.

The clarified voting rights position provides investors and other stakeholders with an updated reference point for monitoring significant shareholdings in Carnival plc. By formally disclosing the current capital and voting structure, the company supports regulatory compliance and enhances transparency in its ownership profile, which can influence how institutional investors track and report changes in their stakes.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CCL) stock is a Hold with a £2654.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Carnival stock, see the GB:CCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:CCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CCL is a Neutral.

The score is driven by improving financial performance (profitability and cash generation have recovered, but high leverage remains a key risk) and supportive technical momentum (price above key moving averages with positive MACD). Valuation is neutral-to-slightly supportive due to a reasonable P/E, tempered by a low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CCL stock, click here.

More about Carnival

Carnival plc is a major global cruise operator, offering leisure travel services through its fleet of cruise ships to holidaymakers worldwide. The company generates revenue primarily from passenger ticket sales and onboard spending, and its shares are admitted to trading on public markets under U.K. regulatory oversight.

Average Trading Volume: 808,754

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: £29.59B

data.title: UBTECH Robotics Signs New MAE Framework Deal and Seeks Bank Credit Backing
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

UBTECH ROBOTICS CORP LTD Class H ( (HK:9880) ) just unveiled an announcement.

UBTECH Robotics Corp Ltd, a Hong Kong-listed Chinese robotics company, operates through subsidiaries including Wuxi Uqi to deliver project engineering services and robotics-related products to industrial customers, and actively manages its capital structure via bank credit arrangements. The company is updating its Articles of Association to reflect changes in share capital following a recent placing, aligning its governance with its expanded equity base.

The company’s subsidiary Wuxi Uqi has signed a new framework agreement with shareholder MAE Group to supply project engineering products and services through the end of 2028, classified as a continuing connected transaction but deemed on normal commercial terms and in shareholders’ interests by the board. UBTECH’s board has also approved an application for new bank credit, subject to shareholder approval, to ensure continuity of financing for business expansion, while proposed amendments to the Articles of Association will be put to an extraordinary general meeting to formalize the increased share capital.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9880) stock is a Sell with a HK$135.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on UBTECH ROBOTICS CORP LTD Class H stock, see the HK:9880 Stock Forecast page.

More about UBTECH ROBOTICS CORP LTD Class H

UBTECH Robotics Corp Ltd is a China-based robotics company listed in Hong Kong that develops and supplies project engineering services and related robotics products. Through subsidiaries such as Wuxi Uqi, it serves industrial and commercial clients, leveraging partnerships and bank financing to support business expansion and capital needs.

Average Trading Volume: 7,458,730

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Tivic Health Appoints New CEO to Drive Biopharma Pivot
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tivic Health Systems ( (TIVC) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 4, 2026, Tivic Health Systems announced that biotech veteran Michael K. Handley had been appointed chief executive officer and director, succeeding founding CEO Jennifer Ernst, who will continue to support the company during the transition. The leadership change is intended to accelerate Tivic’s pivot toward high-growth biopharma opportunities, leveraging Handley’s track record in commercializing late-stage therapies and the company’s Velocity Bioworks unit to advance its immunotherapy pipeline and sharpen its competitive positioning.

Handley’s arrival signals a more aggressive push into late-stage immunotherapies, including the development of Tivic’s lead drug Entolimod and related assets such as Entolasta. For investors and partners, the move underscores Tivic’s ambition to scale its biopharma footprint by combining experienced leadership with integrated contract biomanufacturing capabilities that are expected to support faster development, lower costs and greater supply chain control.

The most recent analyst rating on (TIVC) stock is a Hold with a $0.98 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tivic Health Systems stock, see the TIVC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TIVC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TIVC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, persistent losses, and significant cash burn). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below major moving averages and negative MACD. Strategic progress and improved cash on the earnings update provide partial support, but financing-related leverage/dilution risk and a negative earnings-based valuation keep the overall score low.

To see Spark’s full report on TIVC stock, click here.

More about Tivic Health Systems

Tivic Health Systems, Inc. is a late-stage immunotherapeutics company focused on developing immune-modulating drugs for conditions such as Acute Radiation Syndrome and neutropenia. Its lead candidate, Entolimod, a TLR5 agonist targeting radiation- and age-related cell damage, anchors a pipeline that also includes Entolasta for chronic applications, supported by in-house biomanufacturing via its CDMO subsidiary Velocity Bioworks.

Average Trading Volume: 927,963

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.01M

Learn more about TIVC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cre8 Enterprise Regains Nasdaq Bid-Price Compliance After Reverse Split
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cre8 Enterprise Limited Class A ( (CRE) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 2, 2026, Cre8 Enterprise Limited received confirmation from Nasdaq that it had regained compliance with the exchange’s US$1.00 minimum bid price requirement for its Class A ordinary shares, after its stock closed at or above that level for 10 consecutive trading days from February 13 to February 27, 2026. The company, which had been under deficiency notice since October 3, 2025 and faced an April 1, 2026 compliance deadline, executed a one-for-twelve reverse stock split to cure the shortfall, removing the risk of near-term delisting and stabilizing its position on the Nasdaq Capital Market for shareholders and clients who rely on its listed status.

More about Cre8 Enterprise Limited Class A

Cre8 Enterprise Limited is a Hong Kong-based integrated financial printing service provider focused on listed companies, IPO applicants and private firms in the Hong Kong finance and capital markets. Operating under the “Cre8” and “Cre8IR” brands, it offers end-to-end services from design, typesetting and translation to printing, logistics, regulatory e-submissions, web and branding design, and tech-enabled dissemination of financial reports and market communications.

Average Trading Volume: 56,657

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.18M

For an in-depth examination of CRE stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Axis Bank Allots 287,534 Equity Shares Under Employee Stock Schemes
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Axis Bank Limited ( (IN:AXISBANK) ) has shared an update.

Axis Bank has allotted 287,534 new equity shares of ₹2 each following the exercise of stock options and restricted stock units granted under its employee share-based schemes. The issuance marginally increases the bank’s paid-up share capital to about ₹6,214.46 crore, slightly diluting existing holdings while reinforcing employee ownership and aligning staff incentives with long-term shareholder value.

This routine equity allotment reflects the bank’s ongoing use of equity-linked compensation as part of its talent retention and reward strategy. While the capital base expansion is small relative to total equity, it signals continued utilization of stock-based incentives, a common practice among large Indian financial institutions to remain competitive in attracting and retaining skilled professionals.

More about Axis Bank Limited

Axis Bank Limited is a leading private sector bank in India, offering a broad range of retail and corporate banking products and services. Listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, the bank serves a diverse customer base across the country and is a key player in India’s financial services sector.

Average Trading Volume: 301,697

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 4266.3B INR

data.title: Abaxx Unveils MarketOS to Speed Collateral Flows, Boosts Stake in Singapore Unit
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Abaxx Technologies Inc ( (TSE:ABXX) ) has shared an update.

Abaxx Technologies Inc. will unveil its MarketOS platform at the FIA Global Cleared Markets Conference, positioning it as an integrated transaction productivity suite to modernize identity verification and accelerate collateral movement in derivatives markets. Built on Abaxx’s ID++ protocol and supported by applications such as Verifier+, Sign, Messenger, and Drive, MarketOS aims to compress settlement timelines toward real-time and support the evolution toward 24/7 markets.

The first MarketOS use case, Abaxx Digital Title, has already been piloted to mobilize physical gold and money market fund shares as high-velocity T+0 collateral, with plans to extend pilots to additional collateral types, including commodities in transit. Abaxx also moved to consolidate control of its exchange and clearing operations by increasing its ownership stake in Abaxx Singapore from 91.15% to 93.67%, reinforcing its strategic focus on post-trade infrastructure and collateral efficiency in global markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ABXX) stock is a Sell with a C$4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Abaxx Technologies Inc stock, see the TSE:ABXX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ABXX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ABXX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal/declining revenue, extremely large losses, and significant cash burn alongside rising leverage). Positive corporate developments (regulatory access, product launches, and potential financing proceeds) provide upside potential but do not yet offset the current fundamentals, while technical and valuation signals offer limited support.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ABXX stock, click here.

More about Abaxx Technologies Inc

Abaxx Technologies Inc. is a financial software and market infrastructure company focused on building “Smarter Markets” through tools, benchmarks, and technology that improve communication, trading, and transaction security. The company is the indirect majority owner of Abaxx Singapore, which operates the Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Abaxx Clearing, and is also the parent of Abaxx Spot Pte. Ltd., with a particular emphasis on enabling more efficient collateral and energy-transition related markets.

Average Trading Volume: 193,538

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$61.56M

Learn more about ABXX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Brainhole Technology Executes Major Disposal of TeraWulf Shares With Controlling Shareholder Approval
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Brainhole Technology Limited ( (HK:2203) ) is now available.

Brainhole Technology Limited has executed a further disposal of 212,300 shares in U.S.-listed TeraWulf through the open market on 4 March 2026, raising about US$3.2 million in cash at an average price of roughly US$14.86 per share. Together with an earlier sale within the past 12 months, the aggregate consideration from disposals of TeraWulf securities amounts to approximately US$5.1 million, prompting classification of the transaction as a major disposal under Hong Kong Listing Rules.

Because the aggregated transaction size exceeds 25% but remains below 75% under the relevant percentage ratios, the disposal triggers reporting, announcement, circular and shareholder approval requirements. The company has secured written approval from controlling shareholder Yoho Bravo Limited, which holds about 74.96% of Brainhole’s issued share capital, allowing it to bypass an extraordinary general meeting and proceed while committing to circulate an information circular to shareholders within 15 business days.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2203) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brainhole Technology Limited stock, see the HK:2203 Stock Forecast page.

More about Brainhole Technology Limited

Brainhole Technology Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 2203. The group actively invests in and trades listed securities as part of its capital management activities, using disposals and portfolio adjustments to optimize returns and comply with Hong Kong Listing Rules requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 1,562,964

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$151.2M

For a thorough assessment of 2203 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
